fields.label: Site ID
fields.description: Customer.io Track API Site ID used as the Basic Auth username. Find it on the Track API Keys page: https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials.

fields.label: Track API Key
fields.description: Customer.io Track API key used as the Basic Auth password. Create or view it on the Track API Keys page: https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials.

actions.name: delete_customer
actions.description: Delete a Customer.io person and their information through the Track API.

identifier.description: The Customer.io person identifier in the path. Use the person's id, email address, or cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a Customer.io person.

actions.name: identify_customer
actions.description: Add or update a Customer.io person through the Track API.

identifier.description: The Customer.io person identifier in the path. Use the person's id, email address, or cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

id.description: The Customer.io id attribute to assign to the person.

email.description: The Customer.io email attribute to assign to the person.

anonymous_id.description: The anonymous identifier to associate with the person.

created_at.description: The Unix timestamp when the person was created.

_timestamp.description: The Unix timestamp for when this attribute update occurred.

_update.description: Whether Customer.io should only update an existing person instead of creating a new one.

unsubscribed.description: Whether the person is unsubscribed from all messages.

attributes.description: The Customer.io profile attributes to assign to the person.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for identifying a Customer.io person.

actions.name: merge_customers
actions.description: Merge two Customer.io people, keeping the primary profile and deleting the secondary profile.

cio_id.description: The Customer.io cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

primary.description: A Customer.io person reference identified by exactly one of id, email, or cio_id.

cio_id.description: The Customer.io cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

secondary.description: A Customer.io person reference identified by exactly one of id, email, or cio_id.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for merging two Customer.io people.

actions.name: suppress_customer
actions.description: Delete and suppress a Customer.io person identifier so it cannot be re-added until unsuppressed.

identifier.description: The Customer.io person identifier in the path. Use the person's id, email address, or cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for suppressing a Customer.io person.

actions.name: track_anonymous_event
actions.description: Track an event for an anonymous person in Customer.io.

anonymousId.description: The Customer.io anonymous_id value for the event.

type.description: The Customer.io event type. Use event for standard events, page for page views, or screen for mobile screen views.

eventId.description: The optional Customer.io dedupe id for the event.

timestamp.description: The Unix timestamp when the event occurred.

recipient.description: The recipient value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

from_address.description: The from_address value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

reply_to.description: The reply_to value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

data.description: Additional Customer.io event data for Liquid merge fields, campaign triggers, or attributes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for tracking an anonymous Customer.io event.

actions.name: track_customer_event
actions.description: Track an event associated with an identified Customer.io person.

identifier.description: The Customer.io person identifier in the path. Use the person's id, email address, or cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

anonymousId.description: The Customer.io anonymous_id value required by Customer.io for screen events.

type.description: The Customer.io event type. Use event for standard events, page for page views, or screen for mobile screen views.

eventId.description: The optional Customer.io dedupe id for the event.

timestamp.description: The Unix timestamp when the event occurred.

recipient.description: The recipient value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

from_address.description: The from_address value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

reply_to.description: The reply_to value used by Customer.io message trigger overrides.

data.description: Additional Customer.io event data for Liquid merge fields, campaign triggers, or attributes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for tracking an event for a Customer.io person.

actions.name: unsuppress_customer
actions.description: Unsuppress a Customer.io person identifier so a new profile can be created later.

identifier.description: The Customer.io person identifier in the path. Use the person's id, email address, or cio_id value with the cio_ prefix.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for unsuppressing a Customer.io person.
